Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Dijkstra's Crisis: The End of Algol and Beginning of Software Engineering (2010) [pdf] 31 upvotes, 2 comments
  2. The Met releases high-def 3D scans of 140 famous art objects 320 upvotes, 65 comments
  3. Understanding the Go Runtime: The Scheduler 143 upvotes, 26 comments
  4. Show HN: Algorithms and Data Structures in TypeScript – Free Book (~400 Pages) 59 upvotes, 8 comments
  5. IMG_0416 (2024) 158 upvotes, 34 comments
  6. Okmain: How to pick an OK main colour of an image 130 upvotes, 27 comments
  7. What we learned from a 22-Day storage bug (and how we fixed it) 21 upvotes, 2 comments
  8. Bubble Sorted Amen Break 367 upvotes, 113 comments
  9. Vite 8.0 Is Out 446 upvotes, 142 comments
  10. Shall I implement it? No 1432 upvotes, 517 comments
  11. Willingness to look stupid 556 upvotes, 191 comments
  12. Ceno, browse the web without internet access 95 upvotes, 25 comments
  13. Executing programs inside transformers with exponentially faster inference 206 upvotes, 64 comments
  14. I traced $2B in grants and 45 states' lobbying behind age‑verification bills 701 upvotes, 271 comments
  15. E2E encrypted messaging on Instagram will no longer be supported after 8 May 124 upvotes, 39 comments
  16. “This is not the computer for you” 724 upvotes, 285 comments
  17. Run NanoClaw in Docker Sandboxes 64 upvotes, 19 comments
  18. Monster Is the Machine 12 upvotes, 1 comments
  19. Document poisoning in RAG systems: How attackers corrupt AI's sources 141 upvotes, 56 comments
  20. The Mrs Fractal: Mirror, Rotate, Scale 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  21. Enhancing gut-brain communication reversed cognitive decline in aging mice 352 upvotes, 167 comments
  22. Gvisor on Raspbian 29 upvotes, 8 comments
  23. Show HN: What was the world listening to? Music charts, 20 countries (1940–2025) 63 upvotes, 26 comments
  24. Bucketsquatting is (finally) dead 225 upvotes, 117 comments
  25. TUI Studio – visual terminal UI design tool 259 upvotes, 153 comments
  26. An old photo of a large BBS (2022) 244 upvotes, 159 comments
  27. Parallels Confirms MacBook Neo Can Run Windows in a Virtual Machine 11 upvotes, 4 comments
  28. Source code of Swedish e-government services has been leaked 145 upvotes, 131 comments
  29. ATMs didn’t kill bank teller jobs, but the iPhone did 479 upvotes, 491 comments
  30. Launch HN: Spine Swarm (YC S23) – AI agents that collaborate on a visual canvas 34 upvotes, 33 comments

Last generated 11:30pm, 13 March 2026. Source here.
